name: engineering-stages
description: Engineering pipeline as an editable role-graph. An executor implements the ticket and may ASK the Spec analyst when requirements are unclear; a human reviewer approves (or rejects into a rework loop); on approval it fans out to open the PR + notify. Same end state as the built-in pipeline, but every prompt + wire is yours to edit — copy this to insert custom analyst passes or extra reviewers.

stages.name: execute
stages.task:
Implement ticket {{.Key}} ({{.Title}}). Write the code + tests and make them pass.
If the requirements are unclear, finish your turn with a single line 'ASK: <your question>' to consult the Spec analyst, then continue once you have the answer.

stages.name: review
stages.task: Review the executor's changes for {{.Key}} ({{.Title}}): correctness, regressions, test coverage, missing edge cases. Approve to ship or reject to send it back for rework.

stages.name: spec
